form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on March 15 over 600m at this track behind Surrealist beaten 5.5 lengths (35.10). Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on March 15 over 600m at this track behind Surrealist beaten 5.5 lengths (35.10). Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Q Lakeside over 457m in 25.30 last start, beating Konstantin. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Q Lakeside over 457m in 25.30 last start, beating Konstantin. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: A speedy beginner who is back up to 520m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when sixth over 366m at Capalaba a week ago. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: A speedy beginner who is back up to 520m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when sixth over 366m at Capalaba a week ago. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Disappointed last time but just missed the placings two back over 520m at this track. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Disappointed last time but just missed the placings two back over 520m at this track. Others better.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th on April 1 over 350m at Q Straight behind Hooked On Kisses beaten 2.5 lengths (19.26) in a Grade 5. Rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished 6th on April 1 over 350m at Q Straight behind Hooked On Kisses beaten 2.5 lengths (19.26) in a Grade 5. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Free For All on April 1 over 352m at Q Lakeside behind Cake Is Great beaten 6 lengths (20.01). Has ability and can run well.

formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Free For All on April 1 over 352m at Q Lakeside behind Cake Is Great beaten 6 lengths (20.01). Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 457m at Q Lakeside. Hard to tip with any confidence.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 457m at Q Lakeside. Hard to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 2nd on March 29 over 520m at this track behind Hara's Frankie beaten 5.5 lengths (30.14) in a Grade 5. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.
